name: Beachcomber Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the ginger and garlic together.
2. Combine the remaining ingredients in a sauce.
3. Marinate the chicken for an hour.
4. Drain the chicken from all excess marinade, reserving the liquid.
5. Microwave on high for 12 minutes; skin side down for thighs, breast side down for whole chicken. Cover.
6. Turn the chicken pieces and baste with marinade. Microwave on high for another 13 minutes; cover.
7. If desired, thicken the marinade with a little cornstarch and use it as a gravy.
